message:
Add test coverage: tool execute error and multi-step tool loop

Task 13 (spec 8.7): verifies that when a tool handler returns an error,
it's sent to the model as is_error=true, not raised as an exception.
Task 14 (spec 8.9): verifies generate() correctly executes a tool loop
over 3 rounds with proper step tracking and result accumulation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
